exception.message: Unresolved compilation problems: Syntax error on token ".", @ expected after this token Syntax error, insert "SimpleName" to complete QualifiedName Syntax error, insert "Identifier (" to complete MethodHeaderName Syntax error, insert ")" to complete MethodDeclaration
